# 💡 Feature Request

## 🧷 Summary
<!-- Provide a short, clear summary of your feature idea. -->


---

## 🔍 Current Behavior
<!-- Explain what currently happens and why it’s a limitation. -->


---

<!-- Describe what you expect to happen after your feature is implemented. -->


---

## ✅ Benefits
<!-- List the main advantages of adding this feature. -->


---

---

## 🧩 Checklist
- [ ] This request is not a duplicate of an existing issue.  
- [ ] I’ve described the expected behavior clearly.  
- [ ] I’ve added possible implementation notes if relevant.  
- [ ] I believe this feature improves Hammity.app’s overall experience.
